name: AB 2588 Air Toxics "Hot Spots"
what_it_does: Toxic air emissions inventory, risk assessment, and public notification for stationary sources.
jurisdiction: CARB statewide guidelines; administered by the local air district

hypotheses.question: Is the facility subject to AB 2588 air-toxics reporting?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: Stationary sources emitting Appendix A substances report per district-defined inclusion criteria (no single statewide tonnage).
